understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to maneuver one or more selectable pieces (P or S) onto goal positions (+) within a limited number of steps per level, possibly by pushing blocks (B) or interacting with the environment to complete all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P) in the chosen direction by 3 pixels (one cell), potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects like blocks (B) if they can move; walls (#) block movement variably depending on their type; CLICK with target_position switches selection to another selectable (S) at the exact pixel coordinates, allowing control of multiple pieces; boundaries and objects produce specific interaction results discovered through actions, with heuristics like movement.direction_blocked providing hints but not guarantees.
